Each is enforced independently."},"setFundAccessLimitsFor(uint256,uint256,(address,address,(uint224,uint32)[],(uint224,uint32)[])[])":{"notice":"Configure how much a project can withdraw from each of its terminals during a ruleset. Payout usage resets by ruleset cycle number; surplus-allowance usage resets by ruleset ID."},"surplusAllowanceOf(uint256,uint256,address,address,uint256)":{"notice":"Look up how much a project's owner can withdraw from the surplus (via `useAllowanceOf`) from a specific terminal and token, denominated in a specific currency.
